description: Three-letter country code used for joins.
higher_value_interpretation: Identifier only.
missing_value_notes: Required for published rows.

description: Official country/economy name from World Bank metadata.
higher_value_interpretation: Identifier only.
missing_value_notes: Required for published rows.

description: ISO3 country code where available.
higher_value_interpretation: Identifier only.
missing_value_notes: Mirrors country_code for World Bank countries.

description: World Bank region group.
higher_value_interpretation: Used for comparison.
missing_value_notes: Aggregates are excluded from the main dataset.

description: World Bank income classification.
higher_value_interpretation: Used for comparison.
missing_value_notes: Aggregates are excluded from the main dataset.

description: Calendar year.
higher_value_interpretation: Time dimension.
missing_value_notes: Required for published rows.

description: World Bank capital city latitude from country metadata.
higher_value_interpretation: Map reference.
missing_value_notes: May be missing for a few countries.

description: World Bank capital city longitude from country metadata.
higher_value_interpretation: Map reference.
missing_value_notes: May be missing for a few countries.

description: Annual percentage growth rate of GDP at market prices based on constant local currency.
higher_value_interpretation: Lower or negative values indicate greater stress.
missing_value_notes: Missing when national accounts data are not reported.

description: Annual consumer price inflation.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate greater stress.
missing_value_notes: Missing when CPI reporting is unavailable.

description: Modeled ILO estimate of total unemployment.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate greater stress.
missing_value_notes: Missing for countries/years without modeled estimates.

description: GDP divided by midyear population.
higher_value_interpretation: Lower values indicate greater income vulnerability.
missing_value_notes: Missing when GDP or population inputs are unavailable.

description: Total population.
higher_value_interpretation: Context variable; not directly scored.
missing_value_notes: Missing when demographic estimates are unavailable.

description: Food production index covering edible food crops and livestock products.
higher_value_interpretation: Lower values suggest more food production pressure.
missing_value_notes: Retained for the original index-style schema field.

source: FAOSTAT bulk: Crops and Livestock Products
description: Cereal yield for primary cereals, converted from FAOSTAT 100 g/ha units to kg/ha.
higher_value_interpretation: Lower values suggest more food productivity pressure.
missing_value_notes: Missing where FAOSTAT does not report cereal yield.

source: FAOSTAT bulk: Crops and Livestock Products
description: Total production of primary cereals.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate larger cereal production scale.
missing_value_notes: Missing where FAOSTAT does not report cereal production.

description: Agricultural land divided by country area using FAOSTAT land-use bulk data.
higher_value_interpretation: Context variable for agricultural structure.
missing_value_notes: Missing where FAOSTAT land-use inputs are unavailable.

source_indicator_code: Food_Security_Data / Average dietary energy supply adequacy
description: Average dietary energy supply adequacy from FAOSTAT food security data.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values suggest stronger food supply adequacy.
missing_value_notes: Missing where FAOSTAT food security data are unavailable.

description: Weighted analytical score combining inflation, unemployment, GDP growth, income vulnerability, and food pressure.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate higher analytical stress.
missing_value_notes: Computed from available components only.

description: Share of scoring inputs available for a country-year row.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate more complete scoring inputs.
missing_value_notes: No imputation is used.

description: Year-specific percentile score for inflation pressure.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate higher inflation pressure.
missing_value_notes: Missing when inflation is unavailable.

description: Year-specific percentile score for labor-market stress.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate higher unemployment pressure.
missing_value_notes: Missing when unemployment is unavailable.

description: Year-specific score where lower GDP growth maps to higher stress.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate weaker growth conditions.
missing_value_notes: Missing when GDP growth is unavailable.

description: Year-specific score where lower GDP per capita maps to higher vulnerability.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate greater income vulnerability.
missing_value_notes: Missing when GDP per capita is unavailable.

description: Average food/agriculture pressure score from available food production, cereal yield, and dietary energy adequacy indicators.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate greater food/agriculture pressure.
missing_value_notes: Missing when all food/agriculture components are unavailable.

description: Same final weighted stress score published in the score-specific file.
higher_value_interpretation: Higher values indicate higher analytical stress.
missing_value_notes: Computed from available components only.

description: Readable score band: Low, Moderate, High, or Severe.
higher_value_interpretation: More severe labels indicate higher analytical stress.
missing_value_notes: Missing only when no score can be computed.
